name: cross-session-memory
description: The complete self-hosted Cross-Session Memory runtime and lifecycle automation, native to Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Full CSM continuity runtime for Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Memory, governance, living state, beliefs, self-model, AgentBook, checkpoints, context cache, goals, work ledger, onboarding, re-entry, compaction, and handoff automation — wired into Claude Code's native lifecycle hooks, slash commands, subagents, and skills.
defaultPrompt: Search project memory before we start changing code.
Build a context brief for this task from prior sessions.
Show the current context pressure before we continue.
